name: Solista Bellevue (Cogir)
notes: Independent living, monthly fee includes breakfast/amenities. Factoria/Eastgate area.

name: The Gardens at Town Square (Era Living)
notes: CCRC downtown Bellevue, 167 apts. IL + AL + memory care. Full amenities bundled.

name: Redmond Heights Senior Living
notes: IL + AL + memory care. Month-to-month. Some reviews note maintenance issues. Bundled services.

name: MorningStar of Kirkland
notes: 152-unit 55+ IL, Totem Lake. Chef dining, pool, fitness bundled. Full kitchens + W/D.

name: Evergreen Court (Transforming Age)
notes: IL + assisted living. On-site pool, social spaces.

name: Merrill Gardens at Kirkland
notes: 115 units, IL (also AL). Concierge, transport, housekeeping, meals. Walkable downtown Kirkland.

name: Fairwinds - Redmond (Leisure Care)
notes: IL + AL. Income-qualified program for 62+ under ~$55k. Pool, dining, activities bundled.

name: Emerald Heights
notes: Nonprofit Life Care CCRC. Large entrance fees ~$330k-$500k. Not simple rent.

name: Madison House
notes: Koelsch IL + AL. Active social calendar. Pricing varies with care level.

name: Parkshore Juanita Bay
notes: New (2025-26) 62+ IL on Lake WA. Requires cognitive test + physical. CCRC-style bundled.

name: Aljoya Mercer Island (Era Living)
notes: CCRC, 114 residences. ~10 min from Bellevue. Reference only - not in target city.

name: Fairwinds - Brittany Park (Leisure Care)
notes: IL + AL (IL only qualifies). Meals, housekeeping, activities bundled. ~25 yr old community.

name: The Creekside (MBK Senior Living)
notes: IL bundles dining, housekeeping, activities. Pet-friendly. Downtown Woodinville.

name: Bellewood (LifeMinded)
address: 3710 Providence Point Dr SE, Issaquah, WA 98029
notes: IL for 62+ on Issaquah plateau. Meals/activities/housekeeping included. Shuttle.

name: Revel Issaquah
notes: Market-rate 55+ IL, built 2020, 114 units. Dining credits, housekeeping, concierge bundled.

name: Providence Point
address: Providence Point Dr SE, Issaquah, WA 98029
notes: Large 55+ active-living, ~161 acres. Primarily OWN/HOA condos not rentals. Confirm rental availability.

name: Timber Ridge at Talus
address: 100 Timber Ridge Way NW, Issaquah, WA 98027
notes: CCRC/LifeCare, IL+AL+memory+SNF. Entrance fee required. Waitlist 30+.

name: University House Issaquah (Era Living)
address: 22975 SE Black Nugget Rd, Issaquah, WA 98029
notes: 184 residences, IL + AL. Meals, programming, amenities bundled.
